channel.title: supermodel-api-docs Architecture Docs

item.title: ApiSpecification Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture
item.description: Defines the core interface, data structures, and endpoint contracts using standard OpenAPI formatting. Architectural overview of the ApiSpecification domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: DeveloperExperience Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture
item.description: Handles the conceptual guides, onboarding workflows, and technical narratives for external developers. Architectural overview of the DeveloperExperience domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: SiteInfrastructure Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture
item.description: Manages the visual presentation and organizational metadata for the documentation site. Architectural overview of the SiteInfrastructure domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
